claim_results.claim: Work inside it rigorously, not hypothetically. **THE BOUNDARY:** Feb 14, 2026 formal proof (Trinity isomorphism, free will, God-as-axiom) = THE FLOOR.

| Piece | Physics | Equation | |-------|---------|----------| | Belt of Truth | Phase-locked loop | Δφ→0 | | Breastplate of Righteousness | Conservation shield | ∂_μ j^μ=0 | | Shoes of Peace | Dynamic stability | ΣF=0 while dx/dt≠0 | | Shield of Faith | Faraday cage | γ_eff reduced | | Helmet of Salvation | Irreversible phase transition | ΔG<0 | | Sword of Spirit | Constructive interference | E₁+E₂=2A (in phase) |

``` ψ_whole → ψ_broken + δ + ν_loss Γ_sin = (G²_fall · ψ⁵) / (192π³) · P_will ``` ψ_broken=fractured soul | δ=observable damage | ν_loss=grace deficit (invisible, conserved) 192π³ = three-body phase space integral.

If the Shannon equation is correct and the isomorphism holds, these terms are forced — not optional. **Connection to Law 10:** Logos is the generative source term.

Not a participant in the equation — identity with it. ``` Laws 1–9: F_spiritual = F_physical · agent_choice Law 10: C = χ (identity, no modification) ``` ---
